title: Shikshan Mantra OS — SQL Exercise Spec
description: Schema for a single SQL exercise within an interactive-runner module (sub_engine=sql). Validated at module install time by vidyarthi-modulectl validate. Per ADR-0011 (engine IPC) + SMO-0511.

id.description: kebab-case exercise identifier, unique within the module

version.description: SemVer — bump on any content change so xAPI object URNs stay stable

prompt.description: Human-readable exercise prompt shown to the learner. Hindi + English parity required.

starter_sql.description: Pre-filled SQL shown in the editor when the exercise loads. May be empty string for blank-slate exercises.

items.description: Relative path within module bundle to a .sql seed file (e.g. fixtures/employees.sql)

fixtures.description: SQL files executed in order to populate the in-memory SQLite DB before the learner's query runs.

expected.description: Expected value — shape depends on kind. result_equals: array of row-objects. row_count: integer. column_names: array of strings. query_matches_regex: regex string.

message.description: Failure message shown to the learner if this assertion fails.

assertions.description: Ordered list of grading assertions. All must pass for score=100.

hints.description: Progressive hints revealed on repeated failed attempts. Optional.

pass_threshold.description: Minimum score (0–100) to mark the exercise as completed in xAPI.

partial_credit.description: If true, score = (assertions_passed / assertions_total) * 100. If false, any failure scores 0.

rubric.description: Scoring rules. Optional — defaults to pass_threshold=100, partial_credit=false.

locale.description: Languages in which prompt and hints are provided.

max_execution_ms.description: Hard timeout for the learner's query inside the sql.js WASM runtime. Defaults to 5 000 ms.
